scripts.youtube:sync: python3 scripts/youtube/extract_transcripts.py && python3 scripts/youtube/fetch_titles.py && python3 scripts/youtube/build_chunks.py
scripts.youtube:full: python3 scripts/youtube/fetch_channel_videos.py && npm run youtube:sync && npm run youtube:index
scripts.youtube:id-hospital: python3 scripts/youtube/refresh_all_hospital_transcripts.py --slug id-hospital --max 44 --refetch-channel && python3 scripts/youtube/build_hospital_chunks.py --slug id-hospital && node scripts/youtube/sync-knowledge-to-db.mjs --slug id-hospital
scripts.youtube:id-rag: node scripts/youtube/ingest-video-urls.mjs --out data/hospitals/id-hospital/videos_knowledge.json --name "아이디병원" --urls "https://youtu.be/ITtAxPOKv-c,https://youtu.be/zUzZp1ymNZ8,https://youtu.be/5kSfFkF9vrM,https://youtu.be/1AVArLFCR4I,https://youtu.be/NgVygaw52P0,https://youtu.be/CuuiNpDG1pE,https://youtu.be/0GbCGhtMeRw" && python3 scripts/youtube/build_hospital_chunks.py --slug id-hospital && node scripts/youtube/sync-knowledge-to-db.mjs --slug id-hospital
